# DumbVPN

Simple [Iroh](https://crates.io/crates/iroh)-based VPN system.


# Check it on Radicle

This project is primarily hosted on Radicle, and Github repository
is just a mirror to help discoverability. Check-out [DumbVPN on Radicle](https://app.radicle.xyz/nodes/radicle.dpc.pw/rad%3AzT3uVDbEXsEVz1XcvJBPJQjgjAnL) for an up to date version.

Continue to [the original DumbVPN README.md](../README.md).
